input_contract: Drive root, model checkpoints, dataset zips
completion_gate: audit_complete=true; protocol_ready is reported separately and remains false while any blocker is deferred

input_contract: Chapman, fold checkpoints, verified Drive mirror; external datasets only after fold PCA build
output_contract: canonical frozen OOF NPZ and oof_freeze_manifest.json; external files remain under experimental
metrics: record-level y_true/y_prob plus Q=3 equivalence, five-fold coverage, SHA256 checkpoint/artifact provenance
completion_gate: OOF freeze manifest reports manuscript_ready=true; external outputs are not part of this completion gate

input_contract: prediction NPZ with y_true and y_prob
metrics: ECE, Brier, ROC-AUC CI, PR-AUC CI
completion_gate: Calibration and CI available for all manuscript datasets
Full compared to minimum fair baselines
Noise, missing-lead, and sampling-rate stress tests complete
Every manuscript number traces to a file and commit
